chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-398 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. For Non-Prosecution 22-12-2025 None present for the petitioners. **** None appeared on behalf of the petitioners, nor any intimation is received, same was the position on two consecutive dates of hearing, when, in the interest of justice, time was granted for compliance with office objections; however, the same have not been complied with to date. This reflects that the petitioners and their counsel have lost interest in pursuing the matter. Accordingly, this petition is dismissed for non-prosecution along with the pending application(s). JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
